heroTitle: A cinematic celebration of promises, family, and forever.
heroSubtitle: Join us in Chennai for three days of music, blessings, and a love story told in light.
introQuote: Some stories begin softly. Ours arrived with monsoon skies, midnight coffee, and a promise to keep choosing wonder.
dressCode: Jewel tones, modern Indian formal, and evening elegance.
thankYouMessage: Every face we saw across the courtyard reminded us why we chose to celebrate surrounded by the people we love most. Thank you for making the journey — near or far — and for filling our first chapter with so much warmth, laughter, and light. We carry every moment with us.
highlights: Personalized guest invitations with RSVP tracking
Live wedding day hub with countdown, livestream, and guest messages
Private family vault for anniversaries, albums, and preserved memories

story.title: A delayed flight and a quiet hello
story.description: They met at an airport lounge after two weather-delayed departures, sharing a charger, a conversation, and eventually the same taxi into the city.

story.title: Letters, playlists, and long-distance courage
story.description: Between cities and calendars, they built a ritual of voice notes at dawn and handwritten letters on Sundays.

story.title: A yes beneath lantern light
story.description: Suriya proposed during a family dinner on a terrace lit by floating lanterns, while Hana's grandmother hummed her favorite old ghazal nearby.

stages.title: Invitation Website
stages.description: A personalized microsite for every guest with the couple story, schedule, travel guidance, and RSVP.

stages.title: Wedding Day Live Hub
stages.description: A shared live experience with streaming, timeline updates, guestbook notes, and a real-time celebration feed.

stages.title: Private Family Memory Vault
stages.description: A secured archive that continues the story with albums, family letters, anniversaries, and cinematic keepsakes.

rituals.title: The Tying of the Thali
rituals.description: The central moment of a Tamil wedding. The groom ties a sacred thread — the thali — around the bride's neck, symbolising their union before God and family.

rituals.title: Kashi Yatra
rituals.description: The groom playfully sets off on a pilgrimage to Kashi, renouncing worldly life. The bride's father intercepts him and invites him to accept family life instead.

rituals.title: Oonjal
rituals.description: The couple sit together on a decorated swing, showered with rose petals by family. It symbolises the gentle rhythms of a shared life.

rituals.title: Saptapadi — The Seven Steps
rituals.description: The couple walk seven steps together around the sacred fire, each step representing a vow — nourishment, strength, prosperity, wisdom, children, health, and friendship.
